description_long: This is a rectangular loaf of multigrain bread with a dense, rustic appearance. The crust is medium brown and generously covered with a mix of seeds, including pumpkin seeds and oats, giving it a textured and hearty look. The surface is uneven, with visible cracks and a rough, artisanal finish. The sides reveal a slightly darker, baked edge, while the ends show the dense, porous interior typical of whole grain bread. There is no visible packaging, branding, or labeling on the loaf. The bread appears whole and unsliced, with a thick, seed-encrusted crust.
description: A whole, unsliced multigrain bread loaf with a thick, seed-covered crust and a rustic, artisanal appearance.
description_view_0: The main side of the loaf displays a dense covering of seeds and oats on a medium brown crust.
description_view_1: The end view reveals the bread's dense, porous interior and a slightly rounded, seed-studded crust.
description_view_2: The opposite side is similar to the front, with a heavy distribution of seeds and a rough, rustic surface.
description_view_3: The other end shows the bread's interior texture and a less densely seeded crust area.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust is thick and rustic, heavily encrusted with a mix of seeds such as pumpkin seeds and oats, creating a rough, uneven texture with visible cracks and a hearty, artisanal appearance.
